page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: TLPL488B or TLPL477.

Formerly: TLPL488B.

TLPL478 Professional Seminar in Education (1-3 Credits)

Seminar on the issues and problems teacher candidates encounter in classrooms. Exploration of the skills and strategies that best address these challenges.

Restriction: Must be in a major within the EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.
